'''Thobek''' was an obscure<ref name="CCW" /> terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> situated in the [[Thobek system/Legends|Thobek system]], a part of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds']] [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was situated along the [[Widek Bypass]], a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] connecting<ref name="CCW" /> the planets<ref name="CSWE Orooturoo">{{CSWECite|II|424|Orooturoo}}</ref><ref name="CSWE Widek">{{CSWECite|III|329|Widek}}</ref> [[Orooturoo]] and [[Widek]]<ref name="CCW" /> in the Farlax [[Sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="EAOC Orooturoo Widek">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Orooturoo system/Legends|Orooturoo]] and [[Widek system/Legends|Widek systems]]</ref>

The [[Thobek (language)|Thobek]] [[Language/Legends|language]] was spoken on Thobek and also on<ref name="CSWE" /> the Widek Bypass<ref name="CCW" /> planet [[Wehttam]].<ref name="CSWE" /> Thobek was one of the stops taken by travelers journeying along the Widek Bypass between Orooturoo and Widek.<ref name="CCW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Thobek was first mentioned in the [[1998]] reference book ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]].<ref name="SWE">''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Thobek [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square K-10.<ref name="TEA" />

During the writing process of<ref name="SWcom">{{SWArchive|url=vault/books/atlasbts20080831/index.html|text=The Secret History and Continuing Adventures of ''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas''}}</ref> the [[1999]]–[[2003]]<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> novel series ''[[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order]]'', authors [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[James Luceno]], with assistance from [[Jason Fry]], developed a map of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] for reference use by ''[[Star Wars]]'' authors. On a close-up companion map focusing on the Farlax sector, Thobek was placed on the Widek Bypass [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route between Wehttam and<ref name="SWcom" /> the celestial body<ref name="Rules">''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''</ref> [[Tran Mariel]], which were connected to Orooturoo and Widek, respectively.<ref name="SWcom" />
